title: Senator Tony Strickland ( R-Huntington Beach ) criticized Senate Democrats after they voted on a package of bills they referred to as their "Affordability Package."
prompt_preview:

Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Senate Democrats approved a legislative package that will not provide any immediate relief for Californians' pocketbooks.",
    "Senator Strickland proposed affordability amendments aimed at allowing Californians to keep their gas-powered furnaces and water heaters.",
    "Senator Strickland supported Senate Bill 2 (2025, Jones), which sought to repeal the governor's 65-cent gas price hike.",
    "The governor's 65-cent gas price hike is described as a costly government mandate.",
    "There is a mandate for all electric vehicles by 2035 in California.",
    "The South Coast Air Quality Management District has a government mandate on banning gas stoves and furnaces in favor of more expensive electrical appliances."
  ]
}
```
